title: Byg Crates
description: An Apple Crates addon for the Oh The Biomes We've Gone mod
body:
![BYG and Applecrates compat header](https://i.imgur.com/dRFQ5Ga.png)
## Byg Crates
 
Mod is not affiliated with Oh The Biomes You'll Go

This mod needs both [Apple Crates](https://modrinth.com/mod/apple-crates) & [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone) to properly work.


____________________________________________________________________________________

 

### General Information

 

Apple Crates is a mod that adds functional Crates in which you can stock items and set up shop.

This addon only adds in new crates for every wood variant, compatible with BYG




Apple Crates is a mod that adds functional crates that can also be used as decoration. You can sell items in them, or store items. 

Crates come in multiple colors : one for every kind of plank type present in the game, vanilla or modded (but make sure to install the required addons, like this one).

BYG is a nice mod that adds a bunch of biomes and trees and this mod aims to make applecrates out of the wood that the mod oh the biomes you'll go adds to the game. 

make sure to explore the entirety of new biomes there is to find.
